title: bidens pilosa var. discoidea
intro: Bidens pilosa var. discoidea, also known as hairy beggarticks or bitter beggar lice, is a perennial herb native to Asia and Australia, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds. The health benefits of Bidens pilosa var. discoidea include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
